message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 6 more modules to ZigBuilder (batch 2)

Migrated to builder.emitValue() with ZigValue types:
- _remote_debugging_mod.zig - Uses ZigValue.null_()
- nturl2path_mod.zig - Uses builder for default cases
- this_mod.zig - Zen of Python string + empty dict
- rlcompleter_mod.zig - Struct literal with namespace
- uu_mod.zig - Empty struct + error union
- _aix_support_mod.zig - Empty strings

Progress: 19/308 modules migrated (6%)
